chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-962 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge Application in dispose of case For hearing of CMA No.6405/2023 23-11-2023 Mr. Bhawal Din Shaikh, Special Prosecutor NAB.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Maher Advocate has filed vakalatnama on behalf of the petitioner/accused, which is taken on record. By consent this application is allowed. Let the petitioner/accused furnish fresh surety. After its acceptance the current surety be discharged and returned to the surety on proper verification and identification as per rules. Listed application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
